title: traunsteinera globosa subsp. sphaerica
intro: Traunsteinera globosa subsp. sphaerica, also known as the Autumn Ladies' Tresses, is a rare and endangered species of orchid. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Traunsteinera globosa subsp. sphaerica include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the roots, rhizomes, and flowers in hot water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or infusions.
